name: Rigatoni w Three Cheeses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large pot of boiling salted water, add the rigatoni and cook until al dente as it will be going into the oven.
3. Drain and rinse the pasta in cold water.
4. In a large bowl, mix the butter into the pasta until well coated.
5. Add the three cheeses and cream to the bowl; toss well.
6. Add half of the parmesan while tossing.
7. Transfer the mixture to a buttered casserole dish and sprinkle the remaining parmesan on top.
8. Sprinkle nutmeg over everything.
9. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the top of the pasta turns golden brown and is done.
